title: 400 Synchonic Rate and Awakening Shogouki
wikitext:
[]: 400% Synchonic Rate and Awakening Shogouki             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:27 am So far we know the result of 400% synchronization and Awakening of Chogoki results in disappearance of Shinji-kun... Is it because Shinji's AT field is already pulled down or released? Or being pulled down by himself as he wish to get the power of Chogoki? Another thing is, at first Shinji-kun didn't know how to fight with Angel...Why Chogoki can aim the angel correctly and kill it but not destroy/ ruin other things in Tokyo 3 when Chogoki went Berserk (BooSoo in Japanese)? Is this normal for human beings go crazy? Hurting others that they scared of without a doubt? Can't get it after watching Rebuild 2.0... Yet,I am still a Kodomo(Children)...just like Shinji (Refer to last part of EP 21)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 22, 2010 7:52 am I'd assume that Shinji has voluntarily shed his ATF so that he can control unit 01 without any interference... presumably achieving 4x the level of control/responsiveness that Nerv projected possible under normal operating conditions. A berserk eva isn't out of control, it's just out of OTHER people's control... it's still operated by the spirit that animates it from within. they may still be connected to the pilots but synchronizing with them in reverse, as some suspect happened to Asuka in EoE. Normal people do have limits, and when pushed beyond them by highly stressful situations extreme aggression is certainly one possible outcome.

[]:             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Mon Mar 22, 2010 8:32 am so can I treat it as : Shinji screamed inside shogoki "ayaaaaa~" "help me" rather than "'I'll kill you" while those actions are come from Chogoki's soul ?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 22, 2010 8:39 am It depends; he did both and different points in the story. It's also up for debate who was in control of each of the different berserker incidents.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 22, 2010 11:06 am NemZ wrote: I'd assume that Shinji has voluntarily shed his ATF so that he can control unit 01 without any interference... presumably achieving 4x the level of control/responsiveness that Nerv projected possible under normal operating conditions.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Mar 22, 2010 11:16 am Simply put, Momma took over.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 22, 2010 4:15 pm Reichu wrote: Ritsuko's response to hearing about the 400% synch thing is, however, to say that " she " has awakened.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Mar 22, 2010 7:31 pm Well, his ATField released when he became enraged. The anger he felt at seeing Asuka hurt triggered the Eva to go beserk while synchronising with him. They had about the same motive at that point, kick that angels ass.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 22, 2010 11:19 pm Shinji wasn't "enraged" at that point. He was in an utterly vulnerable panic, and pleading for the Eva to move to prevent "everyone" from ending up dead.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Mar 22, 2010 11:56 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: Well, his ATField released when he became enraged. The anger he felt at seeing Asuka hurt triggered the Eva to go beserk while synchronising with him. They had about the same motive at that point, kick that angels ass.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 23, 2010 12:06 am AuraTwilight wrote: Why Asuka, in particular?

[]:             Quote Post by zlink64 » Mon Mar 29, 2010 4:21 am doesn't 400 synch mean they were both kinda in controll together and as for the eating angel part While the eva does have a soul phyilosophers have debated the realationship between the brain and the soul so the actual physical eva itself might have an animalistic/instinctual way of thinking despite having the soul of a brainyiac/teenager in it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 30, 2010 10:32 am zlink64 wrote: doesn't 400 synch mean they were both kinda in controll together

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Tue Mar 30, 2010 11:43 am Reichu wrote: The only philosophy that is relevant is whichever one the Eva universe seems to directly support.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 30, 2010 4:06 pm ran1 wrote: If not, I'm sure I could run through some of my material and start up a thread with the stuff I can find.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Mar 30, 2010 8:36 pm ran1 wrote: Evangelion is heavily influenced by solopism and existential philosphies, with some Freud and Jung (though Jung tends to be a little more subtle) thrown in. So I think an analysis of the brain/soul dichotomy would be worthy to study in the context of those philosophical movements, but I think that has been discussed already, hasn't it?.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Apr 04, 2010 9:12 am It's 400%. Obviously over 100% you get awakened as an Evangelion, so at 400% you're extra-awakened.

[]:             Quote Post by Davetheave » Sun May 09, 2010 11:43 pm ok so Shinji's been pleading for the eva to start working and save everyone. Yui hears this and awakens. since this isnt the first time Shinji's lost time while fighting, his mother, Yui (who worked on Project-E with Gehirn, and had intimate knowlege of the Evangelions from her work with the prototype Unit-00.) i think she saw her son's plight and knew that ingesting an S-2 engine was the only way to gain the power to save her son (she could have postulated this while residing in the Eva or durring the development stage of Units-00/01)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 10, 2010 6:27 am Davetheave wrote: i think she saw her son's plight and knew that ingesting an S-2 engine was the only way to gain the power to save her son
